title: Energy cell (vibroblade)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Energy cells''' (also called '''Energy Projectors''') could be equipped to certain [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee weapons]], allowing the weapon to inflict energy based damage in addition to slashing damage.

This made the weapon more powerful and more versatile. The best energy cells (Mark III & IV) could provide extremely high energy damage that rivaled the amount dealt by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], in addition to the slashing damage, making a vibro weapon with an energy cell incredibly deadly. The weapon was also powerful enough to penetrate beskar with the Mark IV addition: Enhancing the deadliness of the weapon. This energy could take up a number of forms, the Mark IV Energy Cell produced a sheath of lightning on the blade, which could be turned on and off at will.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
